project.goal.summary: Build codex-mem to reach parity with claude-mem for Codex workflows.
details: Parity gaps tracked as bd issues: hooks lifecycle, worker service, session schema, compression pipeline, hybrid search, privacy tagging.

decisions.dependencies.summary: Use sql.js instead of better-sqlite3 on Windows to avoid native build tooling.
details: better-sqlite3 failed without Visual Studio C++ toolchain; switching back requires Desktop development with C++ workload.

architecture.core.summary: Core CLI supports capture/retrieve/inject with sqlite storage and compaction/purge.
details: Event log stored at .codex-mem/events/events.log.

architecture.hooks.summary: Hook scripts capture session lifecycle and tool events and post JSON to the worker.
details: Hooks live under src/hooks and accept stdin payloads for lifecycle events.
CODEX_MEM_HOOK_DEBUG enables raw payload logging to .codex-mem/hooks.log.

schema.sessions.summary: Session, prompt, observation, and summary tables with FTS5 virtual tables and triggers.
details: Tables: sessions, user_prompts, observations, session_summaries plus FTS5 for prompts, observations, summaries.

architecture.compression.summary: Worker applies heuristic compression with tag and type inference before storage.
details: Compression limit controlled by CODEX_MEM_MAX_OBSERVATION_CHARS.

architecture.privacy.summary: Hooks and worker strip <private> and <codex-mem-context> tags and redact content.
details: Empty payloads are skipped; worker re-applies redaction for safety.

worker.shutdown.summary: Worker handles graceful shutdown to stop the HTTP server, drain the queue, and save the database.
details: SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGBREAK trigger a timed shutdown that stops new requests and flushes pending observations.

search.hybrid.summary: Hybrid search uses FTS5 and an embeddings fallback with recency filtering.
details: Embeddings are stored and backfilled when missing; fallback uses lightweight hash-based embeddings and cosine similarity.

injection.format.summary: Injection output includes index, pinned, glossary, and samples with token-aware trimming.
details: Formatter supports index/full modes and JSON output for retrieve.

config.parser.summary: Config parsing uses js-toml with validation and unknown key checks.
details: redaction_patterns use TOML literal strings to preserve backslashes.

hooks.codex.summary: Codex notify hook is the supported integration; [hooks] config was not observed to trigger.
details: Top-level notify uses an absolute Windows path to dist/hooks/codex-notify.js.
Adapters normalize thread-id/turn-id variants for session and prompt mapping.

hooks.exec.summary: codex-exec JSONL ingestion forwards per-tool observations.
details: Exec events initialize sessions from thread ids and capture command/MCP outputs.

viewer.ui.summary: Worker serves a local memory viewer UI with list/detail browsing.
details: Read APIs expose projects, observations, and summaries for the UI.

issues.parity.summary: Claudemem parity issues tracked in bd.
details: codex-mem-3qt, codex-mem-7hs, codex-mem-4jz, codex-mem-go2, codex-mem-brv, codex-mem-s5t.

issues.roadmap.summary: Additional roadmap issues tracked in bd.
details: codex-mem-aiw, codex-mem-pgt, codex-mem-mzj, codex-mem-58a, codex-mem-4po.

issues.quality.summary: Codebase analysis found critical/high/medium/low issues; focus areas identified.
details: Critical/high/medium issue IDs: codex-mem-21q, codex-mem-wml, codex-mem-365, codex-mem-27b, codex-mem-95t, codex-mem-dik, codex-mem-w80, codex-mem-03a, codex-mem-44i, codex-mem-k7x.
Most critical files: src/db.ts, src/worker.ts, src/hooks/shared.ts.

fixes.recent.summary: Recent fixes addressed db statement leaks and silent worker failures.
details: searchMemories now frees prepared statements; worker queue errors now log to console.error.

process.mcp.summary: MCP order: list resources/templates, DeepWiki, Context7, then short sequential-thinking if needed.
details: Astro docs MCP and Playwright MCP are skipped for this project.

tooling.bd.summary: Beads (bd) is the issue tracker; use bd prime for workflow context.
details: Common commands: bd ready, bd show, bd update, bd close, bd sync.
